heading: Short title
label: 1551 Short title
text: This chapter may be cited as the “Federal Seed Act.”
notes: Short Title of 1983 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 97–439, § 196 Stat. 2287Jan. 8, 1983“This Act [amending sections 1561, 1571, 1581, 1582, 1585, and 1586 of this title and repealing sections 1583 and 1584 of this title] may be cited as the ‘Federal Seed Act Amendments of 1982’.”
amendments: Short Title of 1983 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 97–439, § 196 Stat. 2287Jan. 8, 1983“This Act [amending sections 1561, 1571, 1581, 1582, 1585, and 1586 of this title and repealing sections 1583 and 1584 of this title] may be cited as the ‘Federal Seed Act Amendments of 1982’.”
